subcodes.first_line: O thou servant at the threshold of divine good-pleasure! In this moment, when I am companioned by thy remembrance, I have taken up my pen and begun to write [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای غلام درگاه رضا در ایندم که همدم یاد توام قلم برداشتم و بنگاشتن پرداختم تا
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
